Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Harbour Attack.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $5080 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $5000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Harbour Attack.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. This routine also sets the current output device number ($9A) to $03 (keyboard) before starting the game, as if it's not this value, the game will hang on startup. This can be a problem if using a packer which disturbs zero page.
